note: Do not present occurrence unique_case_count as a partition of Tier-1. Only primary_reason_case_count partitions |T|=8.

counting_unit.overlap_count: distinct source_item_id where this reason co-occurs with another
counting_unit.primary_reason_case_count: distinct source_item_id with this as primary
counting_unit.secondary_reason_occurrence_count: distinct source_item_id with this as secondary
counting_unit.unique_case_count: distinct source_item_id carrying this reason (any role)
